textByHashes.39d618a2f9d93208967d023f842cff58fc36fb83: Go away, I'm busy! I'm... Umm... In a meeting!
textByHashes.7f112cae3c62146a79d99adb571deb3366667d48: I suppose they can come in then. If they keep it short.
textByHashes.9b75fdb19e71bbf5d407a86fffeb5909613f703a: My head hurts! I'll speak to you another day...
textByHashes.34d28470c2beb9f8ceae2e7a346198dc7d6886c4: I can't possibly speak to you with my head spinning like this... I went a bit heavy on the drink again last night. Curse my herbalist, she made the best hang over cures. Darn inconvenient of her catching the plague.
textByHashes.042da39b64dbbe080016a74136011d7a15efe20d: Well positions of responsibility are hard, I need something to take my mind off things... Especially with the problems this place has.
textByHashes.90f923fd76844911a9faa3af22e44625212e45b5: I don't feel well enough to have a philosophical discussion about it right now. My head hurts.
textByHashes.9308080ae59b7cb1cc0a05ecff4dff79d49e6941: Hmmm let me think... Ouch! Thinking isn't clever. Ah here, she did scribble it down for me.
textByHashes.a7e3da634433534f08e108c5deef9de2bc11d939: Uurgh! My head still hurts too much to think straight. Oh for one of Trudi's hangover cures!
textByHashes.feed56bbae930fd3ab5610a4b8bdf9d1db24deaa: Ooh that's much better! Thanks, that's the clearest my head has felt in a month. Ah now, what was it you wanted me to do for you?
textByHashes.33f6937edfa279158920eb1c670799feb16ca364: Well the mourners deal with that sort of thing...
textByHashes.06c47360cbc1dd17a1e1843ce15c8d6d7ce10302: Well, they know best about plague issues.
textByHashes.d9bf7813339737afc20dd41950cf26f67eb47936: Nope, I don't wish to take a deep interest in plagues. That stuff is too scary for me!
textByHashes.52e972239b0cd1ab85be654f2a4c8d027a0724c7: Bah, people always criticise their leaders but delegating is the only way to lead. I delegate all plague issues to the mourners.
textByHashes.88d858f95d697b27d4419567143f9bf34a8a2cf0: Hmmm, well I guess they're not taking the issue of a kidnapping seriously enough. They do go a bit far sometimes.
textByHashes.bb4fec1cf84d2b9c3dcc7bc349ebf2de2c9a1098: I've heard of Elena, she has helped us a lot... Okay, I'll give you this warrant to enter the house.
textByHashes.5a7ee10c6e2900591a061b920ec41fb49de510c6: Thanks again for the hangover cure.
textByHashes.de7ec9a5ff20f0ced5287d06edaff46756acb60b: Ah now what was it you wanted me to do for you?
textByHashes.ee3077612ab5a1a325c219e774a642ca5bbd8140: I'm just having a little drop of whisky, then I'll feel really good.
textByHashes.11b819f67eb2042ae7f2b0261dfaa5a06ad60e57: Hello there. Can't stop to talk I'm afraid, I've been left with a lot of work to do thanks to those mourners.
